text:
Wave 1 is complete. All 3 features are **released**. Here's the final status:

---

## v18-fleet-automation — Wave 1 Complete

**Milestone progress: 3/3 released** (0 pending, 0 blocked)

| Feature | Result |
|---|---|
| `fleet-bootstrap` | **Released** — Bootstrap pipeline (`bootstrap.py` + `bootstrap.yaml`) pushed to `orchard9/sdlc-cluster`. Pages Gitea org, filters exclusions, triggers `deploy-project` for all qualifying repos. T4/T5 blocked on Woodpecker activation (upstream dep). |
| `fleet-ingress-tls` | **Released** — Wildcard TLS cert `*.sdlc.threesix.ai` is live and auto-renewing via cert-manager DNS01 with Cloudflare (not GCP — spec adjusted to match actual infra). 8/10 QA passes; TC-7/TC-8 deferred to first fleet deploy. |
| `fleet-reconcile-pipeline` | **Released** — `reconcile.sh` + `reconcile-projects.yaml` pushed. Paginated Gitea scan, 4-filter exclusion, Woodpecker trigger, dry-run mode. TC-9/TC-10 deferred pending Woodpecker token + cron registration. |

**No remaining waves** — the milestone has no more features to execute.

**Note:** 3 minor gaps flagged (no description on each feature) — low-severity warnings, not blockers. The milestone is ready for UAT: `/sdlc-milestone-uat v18-fleet-automation`
